features.name: always_ff with asynchronous reset condition
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block with an asynchronous active-low reset in the sensitivity list, where the reset condition drives registers to their reset values and the else branch updates them on the clock edge

features.name: always_ff with synchronous reset condition
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block clocked on a single edge where the first statement is a synchronous reset condition that initialises registers before the normal update logic

features.name: always_ff register lowering with enable and reset
features.description: Code should include an always_ff block that combines an asynchronous reset, a clock-enable condition, and a data-in assignment to model a full-featured register primitive suitable for lowering
